transcript.text:
[For today's menu]
[Chinese cuisine mukbang]
[And as for the main dish?]
[Not just your everyday jjajangmyun] (black bean noodles)
It's steak truffle jjajangmyun
I've never had anything like this from a Chinese cuisine
[The truffle flavors...]
[Will she be able to finish everything?]
Hello everyone
I'm at Apgujeong-dong today
To try a very special kind of jjajangmyun
It's steak truffle jjajangmyun
I guess that's what they add
Also macaron-shaped Menbosha (Shrimp toasts)
[Mutan] [Gangnam-gu, Nonhyeon-ro]
They always have a waitlist here

But I finally get to try it today Let's head inside
Hello
This place just feels like a regular restaurant and not a Chinese cuisine
They provided a private room for me
A lot of special dishes here
Here's the steak truffle jjajangmyun
28,000 Won (~$20 USD)
Did you come up with all these dishes?
Yes, so that I can make it big
We go to the location to pick up fresh ingredients every morning
There are so many dishes, I'm not sure what to order
Let's see
[Takes another 5 minutes looking at the menu]
I want everything What do I do?
Yes?
Macaron menbosha, Onion Guo Bao Rou,

Chili pepper You lin ji, Steak truffle jjajangmyun,
-Dandan noodles -Just a sec
[Can't memorize all of that...]
Jjamppong (spicy seafood noodles), beef eggplant rice, and chili shrimp, please
[No order left behind]
[Complete]
[Onion Guo Bao Rou] (spicy sweet & sour pork)
[Chili pepper You lin ji] (spicy & sour fried chicken)
[Chili fried shrimp]
[Macaron menbosha]
[Steak truffle Jjajangmyun] (black bean noodles)
[Beef brisket jjamppong] (spicy seafood noodles)
[Dandan noodles] (Sichuan pepper pork noodles)
[Beef eggplant with rice]
[Here we go]
-Enjoy your meal -Thank you

I don't think she can finish everything That's way too much food
Not even 10 of us can finish that
I have never been more excited in my life about Chinese cuisine
What? Incredible The visuals are crazy
Bon appetit Let's hurry and eat
Pieces of truffle on top
Just like that Not the truffle oil...
Let's try the main dish first Steak truffle jjajangmyun
Let's try 1
The truffle flavors...
So classy How can I eat this?
Pop the yolk
Let's just eat the whole thing
Even the fried egg is good
Crispy outside soft inside
It comes out mixed up

The portions are huge A lot of noodles
Tasty
Amazing The steak just disappeared in my mouth
It's just a very tasty jjajangmyun
With the most tender steak I thought it'd be regular steak, but it's not
It just melts in my mouth
The visuals of the menbosha
It's like the fat-macaron But bigger
It's huge
Too big
Can you see the shrimp meat?
Dip it here
It's so meaty
This is no joke
Chili shrimp this time
I have to try a bite of everything first

The shrimp is really big
It's not the batter
It's filled with meat
Which one next?
Dandan noodles
With their special toppings
That's bold Very bold
It's kind of like peanut sauce
Do you see how thick the soup is?
Check that out
This is almost like bibimmyun noodles
How do I explain this? The Chinese chili oil...
That flavor is so addicting
Guo Bao Rou Looks good
Onion flakes on top
This...

I love the smell
How do I say it?
Sweet onion?
This is their signature menu as well
Let's give this a try too
Some parts are very soft
It's fried so well
Next
Check out the top layer This forms for all thick soup
It's as flavorful as bone broth
Let's try the noodles
I love how flavorful the soup is
I'm regretting a little bit
Eggplant rice...
This is also very popular here
So I had to get it even if I don't like eggplants

I have to describe the taste
I think our PD loves to eat eggplants, right?
I can try it, but I definitely cannot finish it
I really do like eggplants
I lied the past few times
When?
Every time
Please describe the flavors for us
Give me some too
I just want a taste
How can I even taste anything from this much?
How?
-That's good -It's really good
It's just really tasty
But I didn't eat the eggplant
I has flakes

Eggplant lovers should definitely order this
I just wanted to try it That dish was for you
It's really delicious
[What is the camera filming...?]
Truffle, steak, and noodles
I almost ate the plate too I bit into it
They really do give you big portions
One of the best Chinese cuisine I've had
I know what this is But I can't think of the name
The sweetness from the onion
Onion Ring (Korean chips)
That's right! Onion Rings
There's this other chip that's similar to Onion Rings It's similar to that
Let's finish the noodles
The refreshing feeling after drinking coke is the best
Fried chicken now

So yummy
Can you hear the crunch?
-How's the food? -Everything is so delicious
We do serve big portions
Around 1.5 servings per order
-Enjoy your meal -Thank you
I didn't realize it at first, but the servings are almost like family-portions
This is You Lin JI
It has lettuce and cabbage on top
First time seeing a place serve this many chili peppers
I can't eat them
I'll try one piece of chili pepper though
1 green 1 red
I should've done that earlier
I thought it'd be spicy
But it's not

It neutralizes the greasiness
The noodles are not soggy either
I love it Yum
Did you guys just hear that juiciness?
This is still tasty
-This is a gift for you -What is this?
[Mutan gift certificate]
Thank you so much
Dine-in with your friends next time
The food got cold because you're filming So next time, I'll serve them hot and fresh
I'd love that
-Make sure to pay for this though -Of course!
Thank you
I can't possibly use this...
Thank you so much Really
Guo Bao Rou clear

Just the chili shrimp now
I wonder what this is
I think it's fried sweet potatoes
Look at the shrimp meat So big
Is it all gone?
All of a sudden
The word "suddenly" reminds me of Choi Joon
[His karaoke microphone-echo talent]
I had all of these dishes today
I didn't think they were cost-efficient at first But the portions were huge
Each and one of them were special and delicious
This felt more like a high-end restaurant experience
Thanks everyone!
Are you finished?
Amazing
That was like 10 servings

You're really good at eating
My son is telling me not to come back home without your autograph
Can mommy go home now? [Subtitles by Anthony Hyun Choi] [antchoi91@gmail.com]
